+def make_loader(images, labels, batch_size, train, shuffle=True):

+    ds = TensorDatasetCL(images, labels, train=train)

+    return DataLoader(ds, batch_size=batch_size, shuffle=shuffle, num_workers=4, pin_memory=True)
